desc: ConnectorOpsSplitCurveAtStationAlongAxisCommand — split a pipe at a station (distance from end 0).
summary: ConnectorOpsSplitCurveAtStationAlongAxisCommand — split a pipe at a station (distance from end 0).
precondition: Pipe resolvable; distance within pipe length.
postcondition: Two pipes + union fitting inside one Transaction.
logictree:
1) Resolver_ElementUniqueId required OR single Pipe selection.
2) Resolver_DistanceFromEnd0Mm required and within bounds.
3) Delegate to SplitCurveAtStation.SplitAtDistanceFromEnd0 (opens its own Transaction via SplitAtStation).
4) Emit left_id + right_id.
